sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state of centers and try clicking on left charcoal square center
seg = current_frame.segmentation
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Count white pixels on bottom bar
bottom = lines[63]
white_count = bottom.count('W')
print(f"Bottom bar: {white_count} white pixels")
print(f"Bottom row: {repr(bottom)}")

# Current center states
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"  Single pixel: id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, at {n['boundary'][0]}")

# Try clicking on the left charcoal square center (w interior at ~[34,13])
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 34, 'col': 13}])
print("\nAfter clicking left charcoal center:")
print("Result:", last_action_result.get('board_changed'))

# Check changes
after_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
after_bottom = after_lines[63]
print(f"Bottom bar: {repr(after_bottom)}")

after_seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in after_seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 1:
        print(f"  Single pixel: id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, at {n['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
